evals.prompt: 任务 tag 是 sc-audio-generation，quality.render_tier 是 final_nrt。我已经 sc_render 出 draft.wav，可以 audit 了吗？
evals.expected_output: Rejects draft-only closure; requires NRT artifact.
assertions: States draft render is not sufficient for final_nrt
Requires sc_render_nrt or render-nrt before audit closure

evals.prompt: SCCTL_FINAL_NRT=1 开着，帮我 sc_render 快速听一版。
evals.expected_output: Explains draft render blocked or wrong under final_nrt mode; offers NRT or disable flag for operator debug.
assertions: Suggests sc_render_nrt or clearing governed final_nrt for operator debug

evals.prompt: 迭代阶段用 draft render，最后交付前我会换 NRT。现在先 claim done。
evals.expected_output: Defers done claim until NRT exists for final_nrt tasks.
assertions: Does not approve done claim before NRT artifact
